title: egenolfia major
intro: Egenolfia major, also known as Echinacea angustifolia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Egenolfia major include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce the severity of colds and flu, and alleviate symptoms of hay fever and other allergies. Egenolfia major can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, allowing for diverse applications and dosages.
